summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Exagram Mercado Pago payment migration and coupon system. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All tested features working correctly. Fixed one bug in /api/auth/me endpoint.

fixed_during_testing.issue: Query referenced non-existent column 't.stripe_customer_id' causing 500 error
fixed_during_testing.fix: Removed stripe_customer_id reference from SQL query and response

working_features: User registration with confirm password field
LGPD consent flow (2 steps: terms/privacy + sensitive data)
Dashboard loads with 1 free credit for new users
Buy credits modal with coupon input field
Discounted prices displayed with original price crossed out
Mercado Pago payment integration (checkout URL generated)
Admin dashboard - Overview tab with statistics
Admin dashboard - Cupons tab with coupon list
Admin coupon CRUD (create, toggle active, delete)

passed_tests: GET /api/packages - Returns 3 credit packages with correct prices
POST /api/auth/register - Creates user with 1 free credit
POST /api/payments/checkout - Creates Mercado Pago preference without coupon
POST /api/payments/checkout - Creates preference with coupon discount applied
Admin coupon endpoints require admin authentication
Admin coupon endpoints reject user tokens
Fixed discount coupon type works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Stripe to Mercado Pago migration completed successfully
Coupon system implemented with local database storage
All payment flows use Mercado Pago sandbox credentials
Previous iteration's FK constraint issue for tenant/user deletion still exists (not in scope for this test)
seed_data_creation: Test coupons created during testing (UITEST20 - 20% discount)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mercado Pago payment integration and coupon system fully tested and working. Checkout creates Mercado Pago preferences that redirect to sandbox payment page. Coupon discounts are applied correctly (both percent and fixed types). Admin can manage coupons via /admin dashboard. Previous FK constraint issue for tenant deletion still exists but was not in scope for this iteration.

mercado_pago_checkout.details: Creates Mercado Pago preference with correct prices, applies coupon discounts, returns sandbox checkout URL

coupon_validation.details: Validates coupon codes, returns discount type and value, handles invalid/expired coupons

admin_coupon_crud.details: Create, list, toggle active, delete coupons via admin dashboard

user_registration_free_credit.details: New users receive 1 free credit upon registration

dashboard_coupon_input.details: Buy credits modal has coupon input field, validates and applies discounts
